question: What are the ids of customers who have not made an order?
sql: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders);

back_translation.intent: 查找未在Customer_Orders表中出现的Customers表中的客户ID
filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求找出没有下过订单的客户ID，SQL反向翻译描述正确使用NOT IN子查询来实现该逻辑，且未涉及聚合、分组、排序或限制条件，与问题一致。
